title: Section 9
content: 9. Conditions of service of 1[Chairperson, members and Member-Secretary.]--The term of office and conditions of service of the Chairperson and the other members other than ex officio members of the National Biodiversity Authority 2[and of Member-Secretary] shall be such as may be prescribed by the Central Government.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 10 of 2023, s. 11, for "Chairperson and members" (w.e.f. 1-4-2024). 2. Ins. by s. 11, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-4-2024).
